_meta.note: Phase 1: schedules block added. index.html reads schedules.mlb for full schedule. game_overlays remain for backward compat.

game_overlays.matchupNote: The Cardinals roll into Minneapolis fighting to stay relevant in a crowded Wild Card race, while the Twins look to solidify their postseason positioning in a pivotal interleague clash. With both clubs desperate for momentum, tonight’s series opener serves as a high-stakes litmus test for two teams trending in opposite directions.

The Yankees look to tighten their grip on the AL East as they open a high-stakes series against a Blue Jays squad desperate to play spoiler. With postseason positioning on the line, every pitch in Toronto carries massive weight for New York’s pursuit of the top seed.

The surging Padres roll into Camden Yards looking to tighten their grip on the NL Wild Card race against a vulnerable Orioles squad desperate to reclaim the AL East lead. With both teams fighting for critical postseason positioning, tonight’s opener serves as a high-stakes litmus test for two legitimate World Series contenders.

The Mariners look to keep their fading postseason pulse alive in the nation's capital as they open a must-win series against a Nationals squad playing strictly for pride. With Seattle’s offense under the microscope, every pitch tonight carries the weight of a desperate team clinging to the fringes of the Wild Card race.

The Marlins and Pirates collide in a desperate scrap to climb out of the National League cellar, with both clubs fighting to prove their rebuilds aren't stalling out. Expect a gritty, low-scoring affair as two struggling offenses look to salvage momentum in the dog days of summer.

The Diamondbacks arrive in Cincinnati desperate to keep pace in a crowded Wild Card race, while the Reds look to play spoiler and derail Arizona’s postseason ambitions in this high-stakes series opener.

The Tigers arrive in Cleveland desperate to claw back into the Wild Card hunt, but they’ll have to solve a Guardians squad looking to tighten their grip on the AL Central crown. With every game carrying postseason weight, this clash serves as a high-stakes litmus test for Detroit’s fading playoff aspirations.

The Rangers roll into Fenway desperate to salvage their fading postseason pulse, while the Red Sox look to capitalize on home-field advantage to keep their own slim Wild Card hopes alive. With both clubs clinging to the fringes of the playoff picture, every pitch tonight carries the weight of a must-win elimination atmosphere.

The Braves and Mets collide in a high-stakes divisional showdown where every pitch carries massive postseason implications for the crowded NL Wild Card race. With the season hanging in the balance, tonight’s clash serves as a brutal litmus test for two rivals fighting to keep their October dreams alive.

The Dodgers roll into Guaranteed Rate Field looking to tighten their grip on the NL West, while a desperate White Sox squad fights to avoid falling further into the basement of the American League. With Los Angeles’ star-studded lineup facing a struggling Chicago staff, tonight is a classic mismatch where the visitors must avoid a trap game against a team with nothing left to lose.

The Astros look to tighten their grip on the AL West as they open a high-stakes series against a Royals squad desperate to maintain their momentum in the crowded Wild Card race. With both teams fighting for critical postseason positioning, every pitch tonight carries the weight of October implications.

The Phillies look to tighten their grip on the NL’s top seed as they open a high-stakes series against a Brewers squad desperate to prove they can hang with the league’s elite. With postseason positioning on the line, tonight’s clash serves as a critical litmus test for Milwaukee’s championship credentials.

The Rockies and Athletics collide in a battle of bottom-feeders desperate to salvage some pride as both teams look to avoid falling further into the basement of their respective leagues. With postseason hopes long extinguished, tonight is strictly about auditioning for next year’s roster and playing the role of spoiler.

The Cubs roll into Oracle Park desperate to salvage their fading postseason pulse against a Giants squad fighting to stay relevant in the crowded NL Wild Card hunt. With both teams teetering on the brink, tonight’s opener is a high-stakes collision where every pitch carries the weight of a dying playoff dream.

The Rays head to Anaheim desperate to salvage their fading postseason hopes against an Angels squad looking to play spoiler in the season’s final stretch. With every game now a must-win for Tampa Bay, the pressure is on their rotation to stifle an opportunistic L.A. lineup.
